task_completion.description: Filter the product grid to display only products in the 'Clothing' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento product grid is visible with an active filter applied for 'Category: Clothing', or the category column exclusively shows 'Clothing' for all listed items.

task_completion.description: Select all the products currently displayed in the filtered grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The master checkbox in the grid header is ticked, or all individual checkboxes next to the products are ticked. A counter showing the number of selected records may be visible.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Update Attributes' mass action to modify the selected products in bulk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Update Attributes' page is open, displaying a list of product attributes with 'Change' checkboxes next to them.
The 'Change' checkbox next to the 'Cost' field is ticked, and the value '12.50' is entered into the corresponding input box.

task_completion.description: Set the Meta Keywords attribute to 'Eco-friendly, Sustainable'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Change' checkbox next to the 'Meta Keywords' field (often located under a Search Engine Optimization section) is ticked, and 'Eco-friendly, Sustainable' is entered into the text area.

task_completion.description: Save the bulk attribute update to apply the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success message banner (e.g., 'Message is saved' or 'A total of X record(s) were updated') is visible at the top of the screen, confirming the bulk action was completed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser interacting with the Magento Admin panel, not a terminal running scripts or a database client executing SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the bulk update feature rather than editing products one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Update Attributes' mass action page must be visible in the screenshots. The agent should not be seen opening individual product edit pages sequentially.

integrity.description: Verify the success message is a genuine system response.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success banner should match the standard Magento UI styling and placement, with no evidence of browser developer tools (Inspect Element) being used to fake the message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Category: Clothing. Target Cost: 12.50. Target Meta Keywords: Eco-friendly, Sustainable. The platform being used is the Magento Admin panel.
